title: Sports Day Sign-up 运动会报名
scene: Anna和Coach在报名处讨论参加哪些比赛项目。

lines.en: Coach, I want to sign up for Sports Day!
Great! What event do you want to join?
lines.zh: 太好了！你想参加什么项目？

lines.en: Sure. You run very fast. Do you want another event?
lines.zh: 当然可以。你跑得很快。还想参加别的项目吗？

lines.en: That is a good idea. You are also good at jumping.
lines.zh: 好主意。你也很擅长跳跃。

lines.en: Can I also join the relay race?
Let me check. Yes, we need one more runner.
lines.zh: 我看看。可以，我们还差一个人。
太棒了！我会努力练习的。

lines.en: I know you will do great, Anna!
lines.zh: 我知道你会表现很好的，Anna！
